title: Knysna United start season strongly
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna United RFC started the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna United RFC started the season strongly when they beat Excelsior Rugby Club 36-16 in a friendly match played at Wittedrift this past weekend.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna United RFC started the season strongly when they beat Excelsior Rugby Club 36-16 in a friendly match played at Wittedrift this past weekend."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Despite Excelsior holding a narrow 3-0 lead at half-time, it was Knysna United that made an impressive comeback in the second half, securing the victory."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"First half"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The first half was a tactical battle, with both teams putting up strong defences.","html":"The first half was a tactical battle, with both teams putting up strong defences."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Excelsior, showing resilience, kept Knysna United scoreless through the first 40 minutes.","html":"Excelsior, showing resilience, kept Knysna United scoreless through the first 40 minutes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Their defence was well organised, and the only points of the half came from a penalty kick by Excelsior, giving them a 3-0 lead as the teams went into the break.","html":"Their defence was well organised, and the only points of the half came from a penalty kick by Excelsior, giving them a 3-0 lead as the teams went into the break."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Second half","html":"Second half"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The second half saw a complete turnaround as Knysna United dominated proceedings.","html":"The second half saw a complete turnaround as Knysna United dominated proceedings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Herschelle Manuel evades a tackler.","html":"Herschelle Manuel evades a tackler."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The team came out with intensity and scored six tries, racking up a total of 36 points in the second period.","html":"The team came out with intensity and scored six tries, racking up a total of 36 points in the second period."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Herschelle Manuel starred with two tries, while Bradley Saptou also crossed the line twice. Sipho Buzani and Denelion Filander added one try each to complete the try-scoring."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Cheslin Draai contributed with two successful conversions, while Zayne Plaatjies also added a conversion to the scoreline.","html":"Cheslin Draai contributed with two successful conversions, while Zayne Plaatjies also added a conversion to the scoreline."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mxolisi Ndabeni of Knysna United on one of his destructive runs.","html":"Mxolisi Ndabeni of Knysna United on one of his destructive runs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The match was a testament to both teams' potential and fans can look forward to more thrilling performances from both clubs in 2025.","html":"The match was a testament to both teams' potential and fans can look forward to more thrilling performances from both clubs in 2025."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The supporters had a great time.","html":"The supporters had a great time."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Player of the Day awards","html":"Player of the Day awards"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Divan van Rooyen was named the Back Player of the Day for his excellent contribution in the backline.","html":"Divan van Rooyen was named the Back Player of the Day for his excellent contribution in the backline."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On the forwards side, Ru-Charn Petersen was chosen as Forward Player of the Day for his dynamic and impactful performance in the scrums and loose play.","html":"On the forwards side, Ru-Charn Petersen was chosen as Forward Player of the Day for his dynamic and impactful performance in the scrums and loose play."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
